'''Scythe 1''' was a [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]] of [[Scythe Squadron/Legends|Scythe Squadron]] during the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. Flown by [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Mianda/Legends|Mianda]], Scythe 1 featured the same upgraded [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]] [[P-w702 ion maneuvering jet]]s as the other fighters in its unit, which increased performance in tight quarters. During the battle it pursued Rebel [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] on [[Death Star II/Legends|Death Star II]].
